import sys
from pathlib import Path
base = Path(r'/home/nic/aiweb/runtime_wrappers')

r = rmc.process('Hello, starting a new project')
assert isinstance(r, RMCResult)
assert r.phase == 1
assert r.accepted is True
print('IMPORT_SMOKE_PASS', r.summary())
